scope: qualify the explicit train-only categorical p(N) used by flexible-carrier GaugeFlow-base generation; report formula/prototype-disjoint count shift separately as OOD stress

law.learned_unconditional_softmax_equivalenc: the unconstrained categorical MLE is exactly the empirical frequency law, so a separately optimized logit vector adds no expressive power

decision_rule.pass: qualify only the train-only flexible-carrier p(N) source and authorize a separately frozen lattice L1 Gate
decision_rule.fail: stop before lattice L1 and localize node-count support, calibration or sampling failure without using target N
decision_rule.boundary: This Gate does not qualify a parent-blueprint law, lattice, coordinates, joint generation, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT. Formula/prototype-disjoint node-count metrics are OOD stress evidence only.
